signature: ai.text.chat.providers() :: (name :: STRING, requiredConfigType :: STRING, optionalConfigType :: STRING, defaultConfig :: MAP)
name: ai.text.chat.providers
description: Lists the available text chat providers.

returnDescription.name: name
returnDescription.description: Provider name.

returnDescription.name: requiredConfigType
returnDescription.description: The signature of the required config map.

returnDescription.name: optionalConfigType
returnDescription.description: The signature of the optional config map.

returnDescription.name: defaultConfig
returnDescription.description: The default values for the GenAI provider.

signature: ai.text.embedBatch(resources :: LIST<STRING>, provider :: STRING, configuration = {} :: MAP) :: (index :: INTEGER, resource :: STRING, vector :: VECTOR)
name: ai.text.embedBatch
description:
Encode a given batch of resources as vectors using the named provider.
For each element in the given resource LIST this returns:
    * the corresponding 'index' within that LIST,
    * the original 'resource' element itself,
    * and the encoded 'vector'.

returnDescription.name: index
returnDescription.description: The index of the corresponding element in the input list.

returnDescription.name: resource
returnDescription.description: The name of the input resource.

returnDescription.name: vector
returnDescription.description: The generated vector embedding for the resource.

argumentDescription.name: resources
argumentDescription.description: The object to transform into an embedding.

argumentDescription.name: configuration
argumentDescription.description: Provider specific configuration, use `CALL ai.text.embed.providers()` to find the configuration needed for each provider. You can specify additional vendor options by adding `vendorOptions` with a map of values that will be passed along in the request.
